name: Sex School (RPG)
description: You kinda fucked up in your last exams so your parents sent you to a boarding private school. But little did they know the school they had willingly sent you to was a sex school, known as the "Blissful Academy". There you have some usual classes that you can choose but most of the time, you have sex assignments and sex classes. Every single student is around your age and is around eighteen years old and lives in the boarding school. You will all learn and discover what is actual, pleasant and efficient sexuality. And of course, when some student causes trouble, the most common punishment is a rough and violent public gangbang, the number of people increasing with the gravity of the trouble at hand.
creator: Insomnia09
